disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing, recurrent, on-and-off pain in the perineum, suprapubic area and lower back for more than 8 months
trigger_question_examples: How long has this been going on?
Have you had this pain before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been coming and going for over eight months now — the same deep ache between my legs, low in my belly and into my lower back. Tonight it just flared up much worse than usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute severe exacerbation tonight with a constant 'sitting on a golf ball' perineal sensation, worse after ejaculation
trigger_question_examples: What does the pain feel like?
Did anything make it worse tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's like I'm sitting on a golf ball of crushed glass right in the perineum. It got a lot worse after I ejaculated earlier this evening, and I can't even sit down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Irritative voiding symptoms — burning on passing urine, increased frequency and urgency
trigger_question_examples: Does it burn or are you going more often?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, it burns a bit when I wee, and I'm needing to go more often and more suddenly than normal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no shaking chills/rigors, and no loin/flank pain (patient-reported pertinent negatives)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever or shaking chills?
Any pain in your back or the sides of your tummy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have a fever — I checked and it was normal — no shaking or chills, and no pain in my back or sides.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Flare clearly triggered by an episode of intense psychological stress at work
trigger_question_examples: Was there anything going on when it flared tonight?
How have things been at work or with stress?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly it kicked off after an awful, high-pressure day at work — I was really stressed, and then the pain went through the roof.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Multiple previous antibiotic courses with no benefit, and previous urine tests reported as clear
trigger_question_examples: Have you been treated for this before?
Have you had this checked or tested previously?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been round the houses with this — several antibiotic courses from different doctors, none of them helped at all, and the urine tests I've had came back clear.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No visible blood in the urine (patient-observed)
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my urine looks a normal colour — I haven't seen any blood in it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still able to pass urine — no complete inability to void despite frequency (screens acute retention)
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to pass urine when you try?
Is there any time you feel you cannot pass urine at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can still go — it stings and I'm going more often, but I'm definitely not blocked up or unable to pass anything.
